title: GitHub - saineshnakra/automated-data-analyst: AI data analyst: chat with your data, generate dashboards, detect anomalies, forecast trends with verified calculations using pandas..
excerpt: AI data analyst: chat with your data, generate dashboards, detect anomalies, forecast trends with verified calculations using pandas.. - saineshnakra/automated-data-analyst
content_html:
Automated Data Analyst (ADA) — Open-source AI for CSV & Excel

Upload a CSV or Excel file and get automated EDA, an interactive business intelligence dashboard, anomaly detection, forecasts, and evidence-backed recommendations—without configuring a BI tool.

Try the live dashboard · Read the engineering story · See the roadmap · Contribute · Report a bug

If ADA saves you time, star the repository—it helps more analysts and open-source contributors discover the project.

ADA is a privacy-conscious, open-source AI data analyst built with Python, Streamlit, pandas, and Plotly. Upload a CSV, XLSX, or XLSM file and it automatically cleans the data, detects the business schema, creates interactive visualizations, flags anomalous periods, projects a guarded baseline forecast, explains material changes, and recommends what to investigate next.

Ask questions in natural language—effectively chat with your CSV or Excel data—and ADA returns a pandas-backed answer with the calculation behind it. The complete deterministic workflow runs without an API key; optional AI features receive computed schema and evidence, never raw rows or cell values.

See ADA in action

Ask a business question. Get the number and its calculation.

Focus on one segment. Watch the entire analysis regroup itself.

Anomalies, forecasts, drivers, and evidence stay inspectable instead of disappearing behind generated prose.

For the architecture, tradeoffs, and failure modes behind the product, read I Built an AI Data Analyst That Tells You When It Hallucinates.

Why ADA is different

Most CSV analyzers stop at charts. ADA keeps four layers explicit:

Layer What it does Trust boundary
Calculation Detects trends, drivers, anomalies, concentration, relationships, exceptions, and data quality Deterministic and traceable
Conversation Turns plain-English questions into auditable pandas query plans executed locally Every answer shows its math
Interpretation Turns calculations into prioritized investigations Clearly labeled; never causal proof
Optional AI Plans queries the rules cannot read and writes a strategic read over computed evidence Opt-in; raw uploaded rows are never sent

Every evidence card and chat answer exposes its calculation. The deterministic product remains authoritative whether or not a model is configured.

How ADA compares

Chat-with-CSV AI tools Traditional BI ADA
Setup Upload and prompt Data modeling, weeks Upload only
Answers Plausible prose; reasoning hidden Exact, but you build every chart Deterministic calculations with the math shown
Rows sent to a model Usually Depends on vendor Never — optional AI sees schema and evidence only
Anomalies and forecasts On request, unverifiable Paid add-ons Built in, with a backtested error you can read
Cost Subscription License Free and MIT-licensed

From spreadsheet to decision

flowchart TD
    A["Upload CSV or Excel worksheet"] --> B["Clean and infer types"]
    B --> C["Detect metric, date, segment, ID"]
    C --> D["Calculate evidence, anomalies, and forecast"]
    D --> E["Dashboard, executive brief, and drill-down"]
    C --> G["Ask ADA: question → QueryPlan → local execution"]
    G -. "schema + question only, when rules cannot parse" .-> H["Optional AI query planner"]
    D -. "computed evidence only" .-> F["Optional AI strategic read"]
Loading

ADA automatically looks for:

  • A primary outcome such as revenue, sales, profit, cost, amount, or units
  • A time field for period movement, anomaly detection, and the baseline forecast
  • A useful segment such as product, category, channel, region, customer, or status
  • Identifiers, missingness, outliers, concentration, and numeric relationships
  • The strongest evidence-backed next investigation, separated from observed fact

If the source schema is unusual, users can override the detected metric, date, and segment without rebuilding the dashboard — and drill the whole analysis into a single segment slice.

Product capabilities

  • Zero-configuration CSV and Excel analytics with an included synthetic demo
  • Ask ADA: plain-English questions (totals, rankings, breakdowns, trends, growth, counts, time and segment filters) answered locally with the calculation shown
  • Anomaly radar: periods outside a robust trendline band are flagged on the chart, in the evidence ledger, and in the recommended actions
  • Guarded baseline forecast with month-of-year seasonality, an uncertainty band, and its backtested error printed next to the chart
  • Drill-down focus: analyze one segment value and automatically regroup by the next useful dimension
  • Movement waterfall reconciling the latest change by segment, plus a segment-by-period intensity heatmap
  • Worksheet picker for multi-sheet Excel workbooks
  • Conservative cleanup, type inference, duplicate removal, and a visible cleaning audit
  • Executive headline, four business KPIs, and plain-English briefing
  • Evidence ledger with the calculation behind every displayed signal
  • Prioritized recommendations linked to deterministic evidence
  • Optional AI query planner and structured strategy synthesis using the OpenAI Responses API
  • Downloadable Markdown executive brief and cleaned CSV
  • Responsive Streamlit interface built for non-technical users
  • File limit and row cap for predictable hosted performance

Common use cases

  • Automated exploratory data analysis (EDA) for CSV and Excel files
  • Natural-language data analysis and chat-with-data workflows
  • KPI and business intelligence dashboards for operators
  • Time-series anomaly detection and guarded forecasting
  • Evidence-backed executive summaries and downloadable reports
  • A transparent, self-hostable alternative to black-box CSV analysis tools

Privacy and model design

ADA works fully without an API key. In deterministic mode, no model call is made — including every Ask ADA answer the rule-based parser can plan itself.

When a key is present, two narrow model calls become available, both typed and executed against the same local engine:

  • Query planner — used only when the deterministic parser cannot read a question. It receives the column schema (names, types, roles) and the question itself, emits a typed QueryPlan, and ADA executes that plan locally. Unresolvable plans are refused rather than guessed, and AI-planned answers are visibly badged.
  • Strategic read — receives only the calculated schema, summaries, evidence cards, recommendations, and user-supplied context.

Neither call puts uploaded rows or cell values into the model prompt. Responses must match a typed Pydantic schema, storage is disabled for the request, and a hashed anonymous session identifier is used for safety controls.

The default model is gpt-5.6-luna with low reasoning for an efficient strategic read. gpt-5.6-terra with medium reasoning is available when the decision is ambiguous enough to justify higher cost. Model calls are button-triggered and cached per evidence payload to avoid accidental spend.

See SECURITY.md for the complete data-handling and secret-management policy.

Architecture

Path Responsibility
app.py Thin Streamlit orchestration and session state
pipeline.py Bounded preparation, cleaning, schema selection, drill-down, and audit frames
analysis.py Conservative cleaning and data profiling
business_insights.py Schema detection, calculations, evidence, and deterministic recommendations
nlq.py Natural-language questions → auditable query plans → local execution
anomalies.py Robust trendline anomaly detection over period aggregates
forecasting.py Guarded baseline forecast with seasonality and a visible backtest
ai_insights.py Optional typed Responses API query planning and evidence synthesis
ui.py Reusable presentation components and Plotly styling
file_io.py Validated CSV and Excel parsing with worksheet selection
tests/ Unit, privacy-contract, pipeline, business-logic, and rendering tests

The codebase favors pure analysis functions and dependency injection at the model boundary. That keeps the business engine testable without Streamlit, network access, or API credits.

Run locally

git clone https://github.com/saineshnakra/automated-data-analyst.git
cd automated-data-analyst
python -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate  # Windows: .venv\Scripts\activate
python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
streamlit run app.py

No secret is required. A visitor can enter their own API key in the session-only sidebar field. A trusted private deployment can instead set OPENAI_API_KEY in the environment or in .streamlit/secrets.toml:

OPENAI_API_KEY = "your-key"

Never commit that file; it is already ignored. Avoid putting an owner-funded key on a public deployment unless you also add authentication and spending controls.

Test and develop

python -m pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
ruff check .
python -m unittest discover -s tests -v

GitHub Actions runs linting, the complete test suite, and bytecode compilation on every push and pull request.

FAQ

Does my data leave my machine? No. Cleaning, schema detection, every chart, every evidence card, and every Ask ADA answer are computed locally with pandas. If you opt into the AI layer, only column schema and computed evidence are sent — never rows or cell values.

Do I need an OpenAI API key? No. ADA is a complete analyst without one. A key only adds the query-planner fallback for unusual questions and the strategic narrative.

What formats can I analyze? CSV (comma, semicolon, or tab delimited), XLSX, and XLSM — including picking a specific worksheet from a multi-sheet workbook.

How is this different from pasting a CSV into a chatbot? A chatbot gives you fluent prose you cannot audit and your rows become part of a prompt. ADA turns questions into explicit query plans, executes them with pandas on your machine, and prints the calculation under every answer.

Is ADA a PandasAI alternative? ADA serves a related chat-with-data use case but takes a different approach: its core uses deterministic pandas calculations rather than model-generated code, and every answer exposes its calculation. ADA is a complete Streamlit application, not a drop-in replacement for the PandasAI library.

Can I self-host it? Yes — it is a standard Streamlit app. pip install -r requirements.txt && streamlit run app.py, or deploy it to any host that runs Python.

Contribute

Contributions are welcome, especially around new deterministic metrics, question shapes for Ask ADA, schema-detection fixtures, chart accessibility, file formats, and adversarial test datasets. Start with the good first issues, read CONTRIBUTING.md, choose an item from the roadmap, or open a focused proposal.

Good contributions make an insight more accurate, more explainable, or easier for a non-technical user to act on. Every new recommendation should include a test and the calculation that supports it.

If ADA is useful to you, a star helps other operators find it.

Deploy

Deploy app.py on Streamlit. The repository includes its app theme, dependency manifest, server upload limit, and headless configuration. Add OPENAI_API_KEY through Streamlit's secret manager only if the optional strategy layer should be available.

License

MIT

blocks.html_en: ADA automatically looks for:

sentences.en: ADA automatically looks for:
sentences.zh: ADA 自动寻找：

blocks.html_en: • A primary outcome such as revenue, sales, profit, cost, amount, or units

sentences.en: A primary outcome such as revenue, sales, profit, cost, amount, or units
sentences.zh: 主要结果，例如收入、销售额、利润、成本、金额或单位

blocks.html_en: • A time field for period movement, anomaly detection, and the baseline forecast

sentences.en: A time field for period movement, anomaly detection, and the baseline forecast
sentences.zh: 用于周期移动、异常检测和基线预测的时间字段

blocks.html_en: • A useful segment such as product, category, channel, region, customer, or status

sentences.en: A useful segment such as product, category, channel, region, customer, or status
sentences.zh: 有用的细分，例如产品、类别、渠道、区域、客户或状态

blocks.html_en: • Identifiers, missingness, outliers, concentration, and numeric relationships

sentences.en: Identifiers, missingness, outliers, concentration, and numeric relationships
sentences.zh: 标识符、缺失、异常值、浓度和数字关系

blocks.html_en: • The strongest evidence-backed next investigation, separated from observed fact

sentences.en: The strongest evidence-backed next investigation, separated from observed fact
sentences.zh: 与观察到的事实分离的、有最有力证据支持的下一次调查

blocks.html_en: If the source schema is unusual, users can override the detected metric, date, and segment without rebuilding the dashboard — and drill the whole analysis into a single segment slice.

sentences.en: If the source schema is unusual, users can override the detected metric, date, and segment without rebuilding the dashboard — and drill the whole analysis into a single segment slice.
sentences.zh: 如果源模式不寻常，用户可以覆盖检测到的指标、日期和细分，而无需重建仪表板，并将整个分析钻取到单个细分切片中。

blocks.html_en: Product capabilities

sentences.en: Product capabilities
sentences.zh: 产品能力

blocks.html_en: • Zero-configuration CSV and Excel analytics with an included synthetic demo

sentences.en: Zero-configuration CSV and Excel analytics with an included synthetic demo
sentences.zh: 零配置 CSV 和 Excel 分析，附带综合演示

blocks.html_en: • Ask ADA: plain-English questions (totals, rankings, breakdowns, trends, growth, counts, time and segment filters) answered locally with the calculation shown

sentences.en: Ask ADA: plain-English questions (totals, rankings, breakdowns, trends, growth, counts, time and segment filters) answered locally with the calculation shown
sentences.zh: 询问 ADA：简单的英语问题（总计、排名、细分、趋势、增长、计数、时间和细分过滤器）在本地回答并显示计算结果

blocks.html_en: • Anomaly radar: periods outside a robust trendline band are flagged on the chart, in the evidence ledger, and in the recommended actions

sentences.en: Anomaly radar: periods outside a robust trendline band are flagged on the chart, in the evidence ledger, and in the recommended actions
sentences.zh: 异常雷达：在图表、证据分类账和建议的行动中标记出强劲趋势线带之外的时期

blocks.html_en: • Guarded baseline forecast with month-of-year seasonality, an uncertainty band, and its backtested error printed next to the chart

sentences.en: Guarded baseline forecast with month-of-year seasonality, an uncertainty band, and its backtested error printed next to the chart
sentences.zh: 受保护的基线预测，包括一年中的月份季节性、不确定性范围以及图表旁边打印的回溯测试误差

blocks.html_en: • Drill-down focus: analyze one segment value and automatically regroup by the next useful dimension

sentences.en: Drill-down focus: analyze one segment value and automatically regroup by the next useful dimension
sentences.zh: 向下钻取焦点：分析一个细分值并按下一个有用维度自动重新分组

blocks.html_en: • Movement waterfall reconciling the latest change by segment, plus a segment-by-period intensity heatmap

sentences.en: Movement waterfall reconciling the latest change by segment, plus a segment-by-period intensity heatmap
sentences.zh: 运动瀑布按分段协调最新变化，加上按时段的强度热图

blocks.html_en: • Worksheet picker for multi-sheet Excel workbooks

sentences.en: Worksheet picker for multi-sheet Excel workbooks
sentences.zh: 用于多表 Excel 工作簿的工作表选择器

blocks.html_en: • Conservative cleanup, type inference, duplicate removal, and a visible cleaning audit

sentences.en: Conservative cleanup, type inference, duplicate removal, and a visible cleaning audit
sentences.zh: 保守清理、类型推断、重复删除和可见的清理审核

blocks.html_en: • Executive headline, four business KPIs, and plain-English briefing

sentences.en: Executive headline, four business KPIs, and plain-English briefing
sentences.zh: 执行标题、四个业务 KPI 和简单的英语简报

blocks.html_en: • Evidence ledger with the calculation behind every displayed signal

sentences.en: Evidence ledger with the calculation behind every displayed signal
sentences.zh: 证据分类账，包含每个显示信号背后的计算

blocks.html_en: • Prioritized recommendations linked to deterministic evidence

sentences.en: Prioritized recommendations linked to deterministic evidence
sentences.zh: 与确定性证据相关的优先建议

sentences.en: Optional AI query planner and structured strategy synthesis using the OpenAI Responses API
sentences.zh: 使用 OpenAI Responses API 的可选 AI 查询规划器和结构化策略合成

blocks.html_en: • Downloadable Markdown executive brief and cleaned CSV

sentences.en: Downloadable Markdown executive brief and cleaned CSV
sentences.zh: 可下载 Markdown 执行简介和清理后的 CSV

sentences.en: Responsive Streamlit interface built for non-technical users
sentences.zh: 专为非技术用户打造的响应式 Streamlit 界面

sentences.en: File limit and row cap for predictable hosted performance
sentences.zh: 文件限制和行上限可实现可预测的托管性能

sentences.en: Common use cases

sentences.zh: 针对 CSV 和 Excel 文件的自动探索性数据分析 (EDA)

sentences.en: Natural-language data analysis and chat-with-data workflows
sentences.zh: 自然语言数据分析和数据聊天工作流程

sentences.zh: 面向运营商的 KPI 和商业智能仪表板

blocks.html_en: • Time-series anomaly detection and guarded forecasting

sentences.en: Time-series anomaly detection and guarded forecasting
sentences.zh: 时间序列异常检测和保护预测

blocks.html_en: • Evidence-backed executive summaries and downloadable reports

sentences.en: Evidence-backed executive summaries and downloadable reports
sentences.zh: 有证据支持的执行摘要和可下载的报告

blocks.html_en: • A transparent, self-hostable alternative to black-box CSV analysis tools

sentences.en: A transparent, self-hostable alternative to black-box CSV analysis tools
sentences.zh: 黑盒 CSV 分析工具的透明、自托管替代方案

blocks.html_en: Privacy and model design

sentences.en: Privacy and model design
sentences.zh: 隐私和模型设计

blocks.html_en: ADA works fully without an API key. In deterministic mode, no model call is made — including every Ask ADA answer the rule-based parser can plan itself.

sentences.en: ADA works fully without an API key.
sentences.zh: ADA 无需 API 密钥即可完全工作。

sentences.en: In deterministic mode, no model call is made — including every Ask ADA answer the rule-based parser can plan itself.
sentences.zh: 在确定性模式下，不会进行任何模型调用 - 包括基于规则的解析器可以自行规划的每个 Ask ADA 答案。

blocks.html_en: When a key is present, two narrow model calls become available, both typed and executed against the same local engine:

sentences.en: When a key is present, two narrow model calls become available, both typed and executed against the same local engine:
sentences.zh: 当存在密钥时，可以使用两个窄模型调用，这两个模型调用都针对同一本地引擎键入和执行：

blocks.html_en: • Query planner — used only when the deterministic parser cannot read a question. It receives the column schema (names, types, roles) and the question itself, emits a typed QueryPlan, and ADA executes that plan locally. Unresolvable plans are refused rather than guessed, and AI-planned answers are visibly badged.

sentences.en: Query planner — used only when the deterministic parser cannot read a question.
sentences.zh: 查询计划器——仅在确定性解析器无法读取问题时使用。

sentences.en: It receives the column schema (names, types, roles) and the question itself, emits a typed QueryPlan, and ADA executes that plan locally.
sentences.zh: 它接收列模式（名称、类型、角色）和问题本身，发出类型化的 QueryPlan，并且 ADA 在本地执行该计划。

sentences.en: Unresolvable plans are refused rather than guessed, and AI-planned answers are visibly badged.
sentences.zh: 无法解决的计划会被拒绝，而不是猜测，人工智能计划的答案也会被明显标记。

blocks.html_en: • Strategic read — receives only the calculated schema, summaries, evidence cards, recommendations, and user-supplied context.

sentences.en: Strategic read — receives only the calculated schema, summaries, evidence cards, recommendations, and user-supplied context.
sentences.zh: 战略阅读——仅接收计算的模式、摘要、证据卡、建议和用户提供的上下文。

blocks.html_en: Neither call puts uploaded rows or cell values into the model prompt. Responses must match a typed Pydantic schema, storage is disabled for the request, and a hashed anonymous session identifier is used for safety controls.

sentences.en: Neither call puts uploaded rows or cell values into the model prompt.
sentences.zh: 这两个调用都不会将上传的行或单元格值放入模型提示中。

sentences.en: Responses must match a typed Pydantic schema, storage is disabled for the request, and a hashed anonymous session identifier is used for safety controls.
sentences.zh: 响应必须与类型化的 Pydantic 模式匹配，请求禁用存储，并且散列匿名会话标识符用于安全控制。

blocks.html_en: The default model is gpt-5.6-luna with low reasoning for an efficient strategic read. gpt-5.6-terra with medium reasoning is available when the decision is ambiguous enough to justify higher cost. Model calls are button-triggered and cached per evidence payload to avoid accidental spend.

sentences.en: The default model is gpt-5.6-luna with low reasoning for an efficient strategic read.
sentences.zh: 默认模型是 gpt-5.6-luna，其推理能力较低，可实现高效的策略读取。

sentences.en: gpt-5.6-terra with medium reasoning is available when the decision is ambiguous enough to justify higher cost.
sentences.zh: 当决策不明确足以证明更高的成本合理时，可以使用具有中等推理能力的 gpt-5.6-terra。

sentences.en: Model calls are button-triggered and cached per evidence payload to avoid accidental spend.
sentences.zh: 模型调用是按按钮触发的，并根据证据有效负载进行缓存，以避免意外支出。

blocks.html_en: See SECURITY.md for the complete data-handling and secret-management policy.

sentences.en: See SECURITY.md for the complete data-handling and secret-management policy.
sentences.zh: 有关完整的数据处理和秘密管理策略，请参阅 SECURITY.md。

Unit, privacy-contract, pipeline, business-logic, and rendering tests

blocks.html_en: The codebase favors pure analysis functions and dependency injection at the model boundary. That keeps the business engine testable without Streamlit, network access, or API credits.

sentences.en: The codebase favors pure analysis functions and dependency injection at the model boundary.

sentences.en: That keeps the business engine testable without Streamlit, network access, or API credits.
sentences.zh: 这使得业务引擎可以在没有 Streamlit、网络访问或 API 积分的情况下进行测试。

blocks.html_en: Run locally

sentences.en: Run locally
sentences.zh: 本地运行

blocks.html_en: No secret is required. A visitor can enter their own API key in the session-only sidebar field. A trusted private deployment can instead set OPENAI_API_KEY in the environment or in .streamlit/secrets.toml:

sentences.en: No secret is required.
sentences.zh: 不需要任何秘密。

sentences.en: A visitor can enter their own API key in the session-only sidebar field.
sentences.zh: 访问者可以在仅限会话的侧边栏字段中输入自己的 API 密钥。

sentences.en: A trusted private deployment can instead set OPENAI_API_KEY in the environment or in .streamlit/secrets.toml:
sentences.zh: 受信任的私有部署可以在环境中或 .streamlit/secrets.toml 中设置 OPENAI_API_KEY：

blocks.html_en: Never commit that file; it is already ignored. Avoid putting an owner-funded key on a public deployment unless you also add authentication and spending controls.

sentences.en: Never commit that file; it is already ignored.
sentences.zh: 永远不要提交该文件；它已经被忽略了。

sentences.en: Avoid putting an owner-funded key on a public deployment unless you also add authentication and spending controls.
sentences.zh: 避免将所有者资助的密钥放在公共部署上，除非您还添加身份验证和支出控制。

blocks.html_en: Test and develop

sentences.en: Test and develop
sentences.zh: 测试和开发

blocks.html_en: GitHub Actions runs linting, the complete test suite, and bytecode compilation on every push and pull request.

sentences.en: GitHub Actions runs linting, the complete test suite, and bytecode compilation on every push and pull request.
sentences.zh: GitHub Actions 在每个推送和拉取请求上运行 linting、完整的测试套件和字节码编译。

blocks.html_en: FAQ

Does my data leave my machine? No. Cleaning, schema detection, every chart, every evidence card, and every Ask ADA answer are computed locally with pandas. If you opt into the AI layer, only column schema and computed evidence are sent — never rows or cell values.

sentences.en: Does my data leave my machine?
sentences.zh: 我的数据会离开我的机器吗？

sentences.en: No. Cleaning, schema detection, every chart, every evidence card, and every Ask ADA answer are computed locally with pandas.
sentences.zh: 不会。清理、模式检测、每个图表、每个证据卡和每个 Ask ADA 答案都是使用 pandas 在本地计算的。

sentences.en: If you opt into the AI layer, only column schema and computed evidence are sent — never rows or cell values.
sentences.zh: 如果您选择进入 AI 层，则仅发送列模式​​和计算证据，而不会发送行或单元格值。

blocks.html_en: Do I need an OpenAI API key? No. ADA is a complete analyst without one. A key only adds the query-planner fallback for unusual questions and the strategic narrative.

sentences.en: Do I need an OpenAI API key?
sentences.zh: 我需要 OpenAI API 密钥吗？

sentences.en: No. ADA is a complete analyst without one.
sentences.zh: 不。ADA 是一位完全没有分析师的分析师。

sentences.en: A key only adds the query-planner fallback for unusual questions and the strategic narrative.
sentences.zh: 键仅添加查询规划器针对异常问题和战略叙述的后备。

blocks.html_en: What formats can I analyze? CSV (comma, semicolon, or tab delimited), XLSX, and XLSM — including picking a specific worksheet from a multi-sheet workbook.

sentences.en: What formats can I analyze?
sentences.zh: 我可以分析哪些格式？

sentences.en: CSV (comma, semicolon, or tab delimited), XLSX, and XLSM — including picking a specific worksheet from a multi-sheet workbook.
sentences.zh: CSV（逗号、分号或制表符分隔）、XLSX 和 XLSM — 包括从多表工作簿中选择特定工作表。

blocks.html_en: How is this different from pasting a CSV into a chatbot? A chatbot gives you fluent prose you cannot audit and your rows become part of a prompt. ADA turns questions into explicit query plans, executes them with pandas on your machine, and prints the calculation under every answer.

sentences.en: How is this different from pasting a CSV into a chatbot?
sentences.zh: 这与将 CSV 粘贴到聊天机器人中有何不同？

sentences.en: A chatbot gives you fluent prose you cannot audit and your rows become part of a prompt.
sentences.zh: 聊天机器人为您提供流畅的散文，您无法审核，并且您的行成为提示的一部分。

sentences.en: ADA turns questions into explicit query plans, executes them with pandas on your machine, and prints the calculation under every answer.
sentences.zh: ADA 将问题转换为明确的查询计划，在计算机上使用 pandas 执行它们，并在每个答案下打印计算结果。

blocks.html_en: Is ADA a PandasAI alternative? ADA serves a related chat-with-data use case but takes a different approach: its core uses deterministic pandas calculations rather than model-generated code, and every answer exposes its calculation. ADA is a complete Streamlit application, not a drop-in replacement for the PandasAI library.

sentences.en: Is ADA a PandasAI alternative?
sentences.zh: ADA 是 PandasAI 的替代品吗？

sentences.en: ADA serves a related chat-with-data use case but takes a different approach: its core uses deterministic pandas calculations rather than model-generated code, and every answer exposes its calculation.
sentences.zh: ADA 服务于相关的数据聊天用例，但采用了不同的方法：其核心使用确定性 pandas 计算而不是模型生成的代码，并且每个答案都会公开其计算。

sentences.en: ADA is a complete Streamlit application, not a drop-in replacement for the PandasAI library.
sentences.zh: ADA 是一个完整的 Streamlit 应用程序，而不是 PandasAI 库的直接替代品。

blocks.html_en: Can I self-host it? Yes — it is a standard Streamlit app. pip install -r requirements.txt && streamlit run app.py, or deploy it to any host that runs Python.

sentences.en: Can I self-host it?
sentences.zh: 我可以自行托管吗？

sentences.en: Yes — it is a standard Streamlit app.
sentences.zh: 是的 - 这是一个标准的 Streamlit 应用程序。

sentences.en: pip install -r requirements.txt && streamlit run app.py, or deploy it to any host that runs Python.
sentences.zh: pip install -r requests.txt && Streamlit run app.py，或将其部署到运行 Python 的任何主机。

blocks.html_en: Contribute

sentences.en: Contribute
sentences.zh: 贡献

blocks.html_en: Contributions are welcome, especially around new deterministic metrics, question shapes for Ask ADA, schema-detection fixtures, chart accessibility, file formats, and adversarial test datasets. Start with the good first issues, read CONTRIBUTING.md, choose an item from the roadmap, or open a focused proposal.

sentences.en: Contributions are welcome, especially around new deterministic metrics, question shapes for Ask ADA, schema-detection fixtures, chart accessibility, file formats, and adversarial test datasets.
sentences.zh: 欢迎贡献，特别是关于新的确定性指标、Ask ADA 的问题形状、模式检测装置、图表可访问性、文件格式和对抗性测试数据集。

sentences.en: Start with the good first issues, read CONTRIBUTING.md, choose an item from the roadmap, or open a focused proposal.
sentences.zh: 从好的第一个问题开始，阅读 CONTRIBUTING.md，从路线图中选择一个项目，或打开一个有重点的提案。

blocks.html_en: Good contributions make an insight more accurate, more explainable, or easier for a non-technical user to act on. Every new recommendation should include a test and the calculation that supports it.

sentences.en: Good contributions make an insight more accurate, more explainable, or easier for a non-technical user to act on.
sentences.zh: 好的贡献可以使见解更准确、更易于解释，或者更容易让非技术用户采取行动。

sentences.en: Every new recommendation should include a test and the calculation that supports it.
sentences.zh: 每一个新的建议都应该包括一个测试和支持它的计算。

blocks.html_en: If ADA is useful to you, a star helps other operators find it.

sentences.en: If ADA is useful to you, a star helps other operators find it.
sentences.zh: 如果 ADA 对您有用，星星会帮助其他操作员找到它。

blocks.html_en: Deploy

sentences.zh: 部署

blocks.html_en: Deploy app.py on Streamlit. The repository includes its app theme, dependency manifest, server upload limit, and headless configuration. Add OPENAI_API_KEY through Streamlit's secret manager only if the optional strategy layer should be available.

sentences.en: Deploy app.py on Streamlit.
sentences.zh: 在 Streamlit 上部署 app.py。

sentences.en: The repository includes its app theme, dependency manifest, server upload limit, and headless configuration.
sentences.zh: 该存储库包括其应用程序主题、依赖项清单、服务器上传限制和无头配置。

sentences.en: Add OPENAI_API_KEY through Streamlit's secret manager only if the optional strategy layer should be available.
sentences.zh: 仅当可选策略层可用时，才通过 Streamlit 的秘密管理器添加 OPENAI_API_KEY。

blocks.html_en: MIT

content_html_zh:
自动数据分析师 (ADA) — 适用于 CSV 和 Excel 的开源 AI

上传 CSV 或 Excel 文件并获取自动化 EDA、交互式商业智能仪表板、异常检测、预测和有证据支持的建议，而无需配置 BI 工具。

尝试实时仪表板 · 阅读工程故事 · 查看路线图 · 贡献 · 报告错误

如果 ADA 可以节省您的时间，请为存储库加注星标——它可以帮助更多分析师和开源贡献者发现该项目。

ADA 是一个注重隐私的开源 AI 数据分析师，使用 Python、Streamlit、pandas 和 Plotly 构建。 上传 CSV、XLSX 或 XLSM 文件，它会自动清理数据、检测业务模式、创建交互式可视化、标记异常周期、预测受保护的基线预测、解释重大变化并建议下一步要调查的内容。

使用自然语言提出问题（有效地与 CSV 或 Excel 数据聊天），ADA 将返回由 pandas 支持的答案及其背后的计算。 完整的确定性工作流程无需 API 密钥即可运行；可选的人工智能功能接收计算的模式和证据，而不是原始行或单元格值。

查看 ADA 的实际应用

问一个业务问题。 获取数字及其计算结果。

专注于某一细分市场。 观看整个分析重新组合。

异常现象、预测、驱动因素和证据仍然可以检查，而不是消失在生成的散文背后。

有关产品背后的架构、权衡和故障模式，请阅读《我构建了一个人工智能数据分析师，它会在出现幻觉时告诉你》。

为什么 ADA 与众不同

大多数 CSV 分析器都停留在图表上。 ADA 明确了四层：

Layer 它的作用 信任边界
计算 检测趋势、驱动因素、异常、集中度、关系、异常和数据质量 确定性、可追溯
对话 将简单的英语问题转化为本地执行的可审计的 pandas 查询计划 每个答案都体现了它的数学意义
解释 将计算转化为优先调查 标签清晰；从来没有因果证明
可选人工智能 计划查询规则无法读取和写入计算证据的策略读取 选择加入；原始上传的行永远不会发送

每一张证据卡和聊天答案都暴露了它的计算。 无论是否配置模型，确定性产品仍然具有权威性。

ADA 的比较

使用 CSV AI 工具聊天 传统商业智能 ADA
Setup 上传并提示 数据建模，周 仅上传
答案 看似合理的散文；推理隐藏 没错，但是你构建了每一个图表 显示数学的确定性计算
发送到模型的行 通常 取决于供应商 从不——可选的人工智能只看到模式和证据
异常情况和预测 根据要求，无法验证 付费附加组件 内置，带有回测错误，您可以阅读
Cost 订阅 执照 免费并获得 MIT 许可

从电子表格到决策

flowchart TD
    A["Upload CSV or Excel worksheet"] --> B["Clean and infer types"]
    B --> C["Detect metric, date, segment, ID"]
    C --> D["Calculate evidence, anomalies, and forecast"]
    D --> E["Dashboard, executive brief, and drill-down"]
    C --> G["Ask ADA: question → QueryPlan → local execution"]
    G -. "schema + question only, when rules cannot parse" .-> H["Optional AI query planner"]
    D -. "computed evidence only" .-> F["Optional AI strategic read"]
Loading

ADA 自动寻找：

  • 主要结果，例如收入、销售额、利润、成本、金额或单位
  • 用于周期移动、异常检测和基线预测的时间字段
  • 有用的细分，例如产品、类别、渠道、区域、客户或状态
  • 标识符、缺失、异常值、浓度和数字关系
  • 与观察到的事实分离的、有最有力证据支持的下一次调查

如果源模式不寻常，用户可以覆盖检测到的指标、日期和细分，而无需重建仪表板，并将整个分析钻取到单个细分切片中。

产品能力

  • 零配置 CSV 和 Excel 分析，附带综合演示
  • 询问 ADA：简单的英语问题（总计、排名、细分、趋势、增长、计数、时间和细分过滤器）在本地回答并显示计算结果
  • 异常雷达：在图表、证据分类账和建议的行动中标记出强劲趋势线带之外的时期
  • 受保护的基线预测，包括一年中的月份季节性、不确定性范围以及图表旁边打印的回溯测试误差
  • 向下钻取焦点：分析一个细分值并按下一个有用维度自动重新分组
  • 运动瀑布按分段协调最新变化，加上按时段的强度热图
  • 用于多表 Excel 工作簿的工作表选择器
  • 保守清理、类型推断、重复删除和可见的清理审核
  • 执行标题、四个业务 KPI 和简单的英语简报
  • 证据分类账，包含每个显示信号背后的计算
  • 与确定性证据相关的优先建议
  • 使用 OpenAI Responses API 的可选 AI 查询规划器和结构化策略合成
  • 可下载 Markdown 执行简介和清理后的 CSV
  • 专为非技术用户打造的响应式 Streamlit 界面
  • 文件限制和行上限可实现可预测的托管性能

常见用例

  • 针对 CSV 和 Excel 文件的自动探索性数据分析 (EDA)
  • 自然语言数据分析和数据聊天工作流程
  • 面向运营商的 KPI 和商业智能仪表板
  • 时间序列异常检测和保护预测
  • 有证据支持的执行摘要和可下载的报告
  • 黑盒 CSV 分析工具的透明、自托管替代方案

隐私和模型设计

ADA 无需 API 密钥即可完全工作。 在确定性模式下，不会进行任何模型调用 - 包括基于规则的解析器可以自行规划的每个 Ask ADA 答案。

当存在密钥时，可以使用两个窄模型调用，这两个模型调用都针对同一本地引擎键入和执行：

  • 查询计划器——仅在确定性解析器无法读取问题时使用。 它接收列模式（名称、类型、角色）和问题本身，发出类型化的 QueryPlan，并且 ADA 在本地执行该计划。 无法解决的计划会被拒绝，而不是猜测，人工智能计划的答案也会被明显标记。
  • 战略阅读——仅接收计算的模式、摘要、证据卡、建议和用户提供的上下文。

这两个调用都不会将上传的行或单元格值放入模型提示中。 响应必须与类型化的 Pydantic 模式匹配，请求禁用存储，并且散列匿名会话标识符用于安全控制。

默认模型是 gpt-5.6-luna，其推理能力较低，可实现高效的策略读取。 当决策不明确足以证明更高的成本合理时，可以使用具有中等推理能力的 gpt-5.6-terra。 模型调用是按按钮触发的，并根据证据有效负载进行缓存，以避免意外支出。

有关完整的数据处理和秘密管理策略，请参阅 SECURITY.md。

建筑学

Path 责任
app.py Thin Streamlit 编排和会话状态
pipeline.py 有界准备、清理、模式选择、深入分析和审核框架
analysis.py 保守清理和数据分析
business_insights.py 模式检测、计算、证据和确定性建议
nlq.py 自然语言问题 → 可审计的查询计划 → 本地执行
anomalies.py 期间聚合的稳健趋势线异常检测
forecasting.py 具有季节性和可见回测的受保护基线预测
ai_insights.py 可选类型化响应 API 查询规划和证据合成
ui.py 可重用的演示组件和 Plotly 样式
file_io.py 通过工作表选择验证 CSV 和 Excel 解析
tests/ 单元、隐私契约、管道、业务逻辑和渲染测试

代码库支持纯分析函数和模型边界的依赖注入。 这使得业务引擎可以在没有 Streamlit、网络访问或 API 积分的情况下进行测试。

本地运行

git clone https://github.com/saineshnakra/automated-data-analyst.git
cd automated-data-analyst
python -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate  # Windows: .venv\Scripts\activate
python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
streamlit run app.py

不需要任何秘密。 访问者可以在仅限会话的侧边栏字段中输入自己的 API 密钥。 受信任的私有部署可以在环境中或 .streamlit/secrets.toml 中设置 OPENAI_API_KEY：

OPENAI_API_KEY = "your-key"

永远不要提交该文件；它已经被忽略了。 避免将所有者资助的密钥放在公共部署上，除非您还添加身份验证和支出控制。

测试和开发

python -m pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
ruff check .
python -m unittest discover -s tests -v

GitHub Actions 在每个推送和拉取请求上运行 linting、完整的测试套件和字节码编译。

FAQ

我的数据会离开我的机器吗？ 不会。清理、模式检测、每个图表、每个证据卡和每个 Ask ADA 答案都是使用 pandas 在本地计算的。 如果您选择进入 AI 层，则仅发送列模式​​和计算证据，而不会发送行或单元格值。

我需要 OpenAI API 密钥吗？ 不。ADA 是一位完全没有分析师的分析师。 键仅添加查询规划器针对异常问题和战略叙述的后备。

我可以分析哪些格式？ CSV（逗号、分号或制表符分隔）、XLSX 和 XLSM — 包括从多表工作簿中选择特定工作表。

这与将 CSV 粘贴到聊天机器人中有何不同？ 聊天机器人为您提供流畅的散文，您无法审核，并且您的行成为提示的一部分。 ADA 将问题转换为明确的查询计划，在计算机上使用 pandas 执行它们，并在每个答案下打印计算结果。

ADA 是 PandasAI 的替代品吗？ ADA 服务于相关的数据聊天用例，但采用了不同的方法：其核心使用确定性 pandas 计算而不是模型生成的代码，并且每个答案都会公开其计算。 ADA 是一个完整的 Streamlit 应用程序，而不是 PandasAI 库的直接替代品。

我可以自行托管吗？ 是的 - 这是一个标准的 Streamlit 应用程序。 pip install -r requests.txt && Streamlit run app.py，或将其部署到运行 Python 的任何主机。

贡献

欢迎贡献，特别是关于新的确定性指标、Ask ADA 的问题形状、模式检测装置、图表可访问性、文件格式和对抗性测试数据集。 从好的第一个问题开始，阅读 CONTRIBUTING.md，从路线图中选择一个项目，或打开一个有重点的提案。

好的贡献可以使见解更准确、更易于解释，或者更容易让非技术用户采取行动。 每一个新的建议都应该包括一个测试和支持它的计算。

如果 ADA 对您有用，星星会帮助其他操作员找到它。

部署

在 Streamlit 上部署 app.py。 该存储库包括其应用程序主题、依赖项清单、服务器上传限制和无头配置。 仅当可选策略层可用时，才通过 Streamlit 的秘密管理器添加 OPENAI_API_KEY。

执照

MIT
